mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PRODUCT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NO, SALLER_NO, CATEGORY_NO, PRODUCT_TITLE, PRODUCT_CONTENT, PRODUCT_CONDITION, PRICE, LOCATION, STATUS, ADMIN_HIDE_YN ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{sallerNo}, #{categoryNo}, #{productTitle}, #{productContent}, #{productCondition}, #{price}, #{location}, '01', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_TITLE = #{productTitle}, PRODUCT_CONTENT = #{productContent}, PRODUCT_CONDITION = #{productCondition}, PRICE = #{price}, LOCATION = #{location}, STATUS = #{status}, MODIFY_DT = SYSDATE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND SALLER_NO = #{sallerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO, p.SALLER_NO, p.CATEGORY_NO, p.PRODUCT_TITLE, p.PRODUCT_CONTENT, p.PRODUCT_CONDITION, p.PRICE, p.LOCATION, p.STATUS, p.ADMIN_HIDE_YN, p.HIDE_REASON, p.VIEW_COUNT, TO_CHAR(p.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createDt, TO_CHAR(p.MODIFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifyDt, p.LIKE_CNT, p.CHAT_CNT, c1.CATEGORY_NAME AS largeName, c2.CATEGORY_NAME AS middleName, c3.CATEGORY_NAME AS smallName FROM PRODUCT p LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c3 ON p.CATEGORY_NO = c3.CATEGORY_NO LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c2 ON c3.PARENT_CATEGORY_NO = c2.CATEGORY_NO LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c1 ON c2.PARENT_CATEGORY_NO = c1.CATEGORY_NO WHERE p.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}

SELECT PRODUCT_NO as productNo, SALLER_NO as sallerNo, CATEGORY_NO as categoryNo, PRODUCT_TITLE as productTitle, PRODUCT_CONTENT as productContent, PRODUCT_CONDITION as productCondition, PRICE as price, LOCATION as location, STATUS as status, ADMIN_HIDE_YN as adminHideYn, HIDE_REASON as hideReason, VIEW_COUNT as viewCount, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createDt, LIKE_CNT as likeCnt, CHAT_CNT as chatCnt FROM PRODUCT WHERE ADMIN_HIDE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET chat_cnt = chat_cnt - 1 WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND chat_cnt > 0
